title: chloraea cylindrostachya
intro: Chloraea cylindrostachya, also known as the cylindrical greenhood orchid, is a species of orchid native to New Zealand and Australia. It is a terrestrial orchid with a cylindrical flower spike bearing greenish-yellow flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Maori medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The roots and leaves of Chloraea cylindrostachya are used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to harness its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
